translation: self.assertEqual("negative", negative, validator.validate3("[" + self.__US_DOLLAR + "1,234.567]", pattern, locale.US))
self.assertEqual("no symbol +ve", expected, validator.validate3("1,234.567", pattern, locale.US))
self.assertEqual("no symbol -ve", negative, validator.validate3("[1,234.567]", pattern, locale.US))
self.assertEqual("UK no symbol", expected, validator.validate2("1,234.56", locale.UK))
self.assertEqual("US no symbol", expected, validator.validate2("1,234.56", locale.US))
